articles.title: Paradise island horror as North Carolina grandpa goes missing while snorkeling in Hawaii

articles.title: Cop dad shoots his two children, 9 & 13, and wife before turning gun on himself in horrific murder-suicide

The harrowing ordeal took place in Villers-en-Arthies, just outside of Paris. The picturesque town has since been completely blocked off as authorities desperately try to work out what happened. articles.description: A team of British Army medics and paratroopers airdropped onto the remote Atlantic island of Tristan de Cunha Saturday to render aid to a British national suspected of contracting hantavirus on the MV Hondius.

articles.title: 4 LTO personnel suspended, 2 fired over Mindoro 'irregularities'
articles.description: CALAPAN CITY, Oriental Mindoro — Four regular employees of the Land Transportation Office (LTO) at the San Jose, Occidental Mindoro District Office have been placed under preventive suspension, while two job order personnel were terminated over alleged irregularities and corrupt practices. In a letter dated May 5, 2026, addressed to LTO MIMAROPA Regional Director Francisco Ranches, Intelligence and Investigation Division Chief Renante Melitante ordered the immediate preventive suspension of the four regular LTO employees. The same order, a copy of which was obtained by the Inquirer on Saturday, directed the termination of service contracts of two job order personnel “without [...]... Keep on reading: 4 LTO personnel suspended, 2 fired over Mindoro 'irregularities'

articles.title: Road work slows traffic on San Francisco's 19th Avenue -- but drivers say it's worth it
articles.description: A major construction project is causing delays this weekend along one of San Francisco's busiest corridors but drivers say the inconvenience may finally be worth it. Caltrans crews are repaving southbound 19th Avenue in the Sunset District from Lincoln Avenue to Sloat Boulevard.
